narrative:
Lancaster City 5-B (precinct in Fairfield County) has 789 registered voters, with 65.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
